files.contents:
Hello World

Tailwind CSS is built via PostCSS and served locally.

# Express + Tailwind CSS (PostCSS build)

## Setup
- Node.js 18+ recommended

```sh
npm install
```

## Build
- Compiles TypeScript and builds Tailwind to public/styles.css
```sh
npm run build
```

## Run
```sh
npm start
```
Visit http://localhost:3000 and you should see the styled Hello World page.

## Tests
- Ensures the server serves the page and the built CSS
```sh
npm test
```

## How it works
- Tailwind input: src/styles/input.css
- Tailwind config: tailwind.config.js
- PostCSS config: postcss.config.js
- Built CSS output: public/styles.css (generated by npm run build)
- Express serves static files from public/

notes: Run npm run build to generate public/styles.css via Tailwind before starting the server. npm start and npm test already run the build step.
